scope: demo mode · 4 cities · all home sections

items.title: LIVE demo-bleed
items.symptom: On LIVE, an empty city (Sydney) shows full demo totals + a 4-city Featured strip.
items.root_cause: switch-to-live does not purge demo listings; the !DEMO_MODE demo_ guard incomplete at 3 sites; selectCity never re-renders Featured/HomeStats.
items.reason: Already fixed in Session 123 - resolved this run.

items.title: Adventures taxonomy
items.symptom: Wave-1 (NY/London/Sydney) Adventures Stays/Experiences sub-tabs render empty ("No Adventures yet").
items.root_cause: Wave-1 adventures tagged bare cat:Adventures; missing adventures_experiences sub-type + no accommodation rows.
items.reason: Already fixed in Session 123 - resolved this run.

items.title: Card/detail photo parity
items.symptom: 4 demo cards show a dead placeholder image while the detail view shows a live hero.
items.root_cause: card/featured/my-requests/local-market render scalar l.photo; detail renders photos[0]||photo; 23 Wave-1 listings diverge.
items.reason: Already fixed in Session 123 - resolved this run.

items.title: Demo gallery images
items.symptom: 27 dead Unsplash URLs sit in the secondary gallery of 34 demo listings (hero fine; only seen on swipe).
items.root_cause: demo_listings.json secondary photos[] gallery URLs rotted/fabricated.
items.reason: Already on the backlog as DEMO-5 - reusing, not re-filed.
items.route_reason: 27 dead gallery URLs: correct fix is R2 self-host (DEMO-4), not re-hotlinking rot-prone Unsplash URLs (S122 link-rot lesson). Not a surgical green code change.

items.title: Adventures price suffix
items.root_cause: renderAdvGrid hardcodes the price suffix by type and ignores the data per field.
items.reason: Already on the backlog as DEMO-6 - reusing, not re-filed.
items.ship_detail: renderAdvGrid honours l.per (mislabeled /person/night fixed); ms.js v153; deployed, smoke-green, live-verified

items.title: Category counts paused-guard
items.symptom: Latent: a future non-placeholder paused demo listing could inflate a category tile count.
items.root_cause: renderCatCounts excludes ph_ placeholders but not l.paused.
items.reason: Already on the backlog as DEMO-7 - reusing, not re-filed.
items.ship_detail: renderCatCounts excludes l.paused at both count sites; ms.js v153; deployed, smoke-green

items.title: Adventure currency
items.symptom: Suspected Adventure grid vs detail currency mismatch (R89 vs $89).
items.root_cause: Suspected grid price label not country-aware.
items.reason: Adventure price is computed correctly per country (_priceLabel / ADV_COUNTRY_CURRENCY, fixed S122); grid == detail. No mismatch.

items.title: Placeholder counts
items.symptom: Suspected ph_ placeholder cards leak into other cities' category counts.
items.root_cause: Suspected ph_ rows not excluded from the count path.
items.reason: ph_ placeholder cards are excluded from category counts and city-scoped (S118/S145). They do not leak into other cities' counts.

items.title: World Heritage reset
items.symptom: Suspected World Heritage strip stuck on the demo country after demo→live.
items.root_cause: Suspected _wfCountry not reset on mode switch.
items.reason: World Heritage strip demo->live reset is wired (_wfCountry reset + dropdown sync + re-render, S117/S144).

items.title: Detail hero images
items.reason: All detail-page hero images verified alive on gentle low-concurrency HEAD re-check. The earlier dead read was an Unsplash rate-limit false positive.

items.title: Category tile row
items.symptom: Suspected category tile row differs across cities.
items.root_cause: Suspected per-city divergence in the tile row.
items.reason: The category tile row is identical across cities via normCat and always renders (0-count tiles show '0 listings', S120/S147).

items.title: Unnamed first-pass flags
items.symptom: Aggregate: 2 further first-pass flags ruled out on gentle re-verify (not individually named in the S123 record).
items.root_cause: Aggregate placeholder so the 7-of-9 false-positive count reconciles (5 named + 2 here).
items.reason: Two further S123 first-pass flags dismissed on gentle verify; not individually named in the record. Held as one aggregate so the 7-of-9 count reconciles.
